name: codex-notify-hooks
description: Install privacy-first macOS Codex notifications with permission prompts and best-effort session routing.

interface.shortDescription: Private macOS alerts and session routing for Codex.
interface.longDescription: AI Session Notifier installs global Codex hooks that show prominent macOS notifications when a turn stops or Codex waits for permission. It keeps a bounded, redacted local event ledger, applies noise controls, and attempts to reopen the originating Codex or VS Code session.
defaultPrompt: Explain the Codex notify hook setup.
